ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., government, external API) */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data (e.g., daily, monthly, yearly) */,
  "data_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the data */,
  "data_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the economic indicator */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the economic indicator (e.g., GDP, inflation, employment) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the economic indicator (e.g., GDP growth rate, inflation rate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_series_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data point corresponds to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator for the given year */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of value (e.g., actual, forecasted, predicted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forecasting model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of forecasting model (e.g., ARIMA, Prophet, LSTM) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the forecasting model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting result */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date the forecast was made */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Forecasted value of the economic indicator */,
  "Lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the forecasted value */,
  "Upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the forecasted value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasting_results_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasting_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecasting_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_datasets" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has to the dataset (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation result */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date the validation was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for validation (e.g., data profiling, data quality checks) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "anomaly_date" TEXT /* Date the anomaly was detected */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly (e.g., outlier, missing value) */,
  "anomaly_description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES time_series_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., completeness, consistency) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_lineage" (
  "lineage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lineage record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "source_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source dataset */,
  "transformation_applied" TEXT /* Transformation applied to the data (e.g., aggregation, filtering) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lineage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_lineage_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_lineage_source_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_certification" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date the certification was performed */,
  "certification_status" TEXT /* Status of the certification (e.g., certified, not certified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_certification_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
